name: abdoria
description: App gamificado de treino de abdômen — XP, streak, conquistas, loja Abdoria e ranking. Para quem treina em casa.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.build:vercel: npm run build --prefix server && node scripts/copy-api-server.mjs && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
